tailwind.container: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden
tailwind.header_cells: px-6 py-4 text-xs font-bold text-blue-800 uppercase tracking-wider
tailwind.numeric: font-mono font-medium text-blue-600 bg-blue-50 px-2 py-1 rounded

tailwind.title: text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-4 border-b pb-3
tailwind.input: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 transition-all

tailwind.primary: bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 border border-blue-200 inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
tailwind.success: bg-green-100 text-green-800 border border-green-200 inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

tailwind.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all
tailwind.success: bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-md shadow-sm transition-all
tailwind.outline: text-blue-600 border border-blue-600 rounded-md hover:bg-blue-50 cursor-pointer px-4 py-2
